Panjshir

The legendary Five Lions valley of emerald mines and resistance history.

Plan a Visit
CENTRAL

About Panjshir

A dramatic, narrow gorge carved by a glacial river. Panjshir is world-renowned for its high-quality emeralds and its history as an unconquerable fortress. Travelers visit the Massoud Mausoleum and the Paryan Valley for breathtaking alpine scenery and mountain air.

Highlights

Attractions in Panjshir

Landmarks

Ahmad Shah Massoud Mausoleum

The domed monument of the Panjshir.

Panjshir

Nature & Adventure

Paryan Valley

Pristine alpine trekking and river headwaters.

Panjshir
